b7bd156a6244: Flipout is JackPoker's all-in tournament format. Every player is automatically all-in on every hand — no betting rounds, no decisions to make mid-hand. Cards are dealt, hands are revealed, and the best hand takes the pot. The format strips poker down to its most essential element: hand strength versus hand strength. Tournaments play out fast and the variance creates massive excitement on every single deal.
